[{"document_id":"3ed88ec4-4511-5b81-bc19-71d1bad42da6","chunk_id":"658883ed-649b-5122-bdd8-defd5a89db47","document":"08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"From: Sydney Water Property Services <propertyservices@sydneywater.com.au>
To: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
Subject: Sewerage services diagram ÔÇö 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield ÔÇö Order #SW-884412
Date: 8 May 2026 2:17 PM

Dear Amelia Harrison,

Please find attached the sewerage services diagram for **Lot 14 DP 789012, 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield NSW 2070**.

**Summary from diagram SW-DIA-2070-14-088:**

- 150 mm diameter sewer main located in **Drainage Easement 2.0 m wide** along southern boundary
- Maintenance hole **MH-4471** within easement at south-west corner of lot
- Minimum clearance to structures per Sydney Water Building Over Sewer policy applies
- **Section 73 or Build Over Sewer application likely required** if proposed footings or slabs encroach within 2.0 m of sewer or over alignment

This diagram is current as at 8 May 2026. For design submissions contact Developer Services.

Regards,
Sydney Water Property Services

---

From: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
To: Michael Chen <michael.chen@gmail.com>; Priya Menon <p.menon@terratech.com.au>
Subject: FW: Sewer diagram ÔÇö Chen site ÔÇö footing set-back implications
Date: 9 May 2026 9:48 AM

Team,

Sewer runs along south boundary in registered easement. Geotech BH-2 is close to this zone. Priya ÔÇö please flag if stiffened raft edge loads need BOS clearance. Michael ÔÇö this may pull garage footprint north by ~1 m unless we pursue formal BOS approval (adds 4ÔÇô6 weeks and Sydney Water fees approx. $3,800).

Amelia","score":0.01639344262295082},{"document_id":"27710665-8947-5669-8a50-2ea96e0d5e58","chunk_id":"98b7e543-ebb0-51d0-82de-a5039b0c2c0e","document":"11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","page_or_section":"Critical path notes","snippet":"## Critical path notes

- Sydney Water Build Over Sewer may affect garage footprint ÔÇö resolve before DD lock (refer sewer diagram SW-DIA-2070-14-088).
- H1 site classification requires structural footing design before CC pathway complete.
- Principal certifier appointment required before CC application (post DA).

**Author:** Amelia Harrison, Harrison Clarke Studio","score":0.016129032258064516},{"document_id":"cbc97210-df26-52ef-bd9a-7ded1c0ea55c","chunk_id":"ae90d94b-c62c-56ff-b668-c96a5cb766eb","document":"10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"attached ($4,850 + GST) by **29 May 2026**.

**What's happened:** Survey shows fall to rear; sewer easement limits south-side storage.

**What's next:** If you approve, we issue CivilFlow instruction this week and fold their concept into schematic massing.

**Background:** OSD sizing can affect garage position ÔÇö better resolved before design locks.

Amelia","score":0.015873015873015872},{"document_id":"649a0f8f-d05d-5359-9327-ac4090584ed0","chunk_id":"26471d90-2d8f-5ed1-baaa-2f6c4a685c71","document":"05-survey-report-north-shore-surveying.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/05-survey-report-north-shore-surveying.md","page_or_section":"Services & easements","snippet":"## Services & easements

- **Sydney Water:** 150 mm sewer in 2.0 m wide drainage easement along southern boundary. Maintenance hole at rear corner. **Build-over likely requires Sydney Water assessment.**
- **Electricity:** Overhead line to street; underground service pit in footpath ÔÇö location marked Sheet 2.
- **NBN:** Pit in footpath, north of lot.","score":0.015625},{"document_id":"cbc97210-df26-52ef-bd9a-7ded1c0ea55c","chunk_id":"4963ef24-f7be-58ec-9767-d596e0351abf","document":"10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/10-email-stormwater-consultant-quote.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"From: Kate Morrison <k.morrison@civilflow.com.au>
To: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
Subject: Stormwater / OSD concept advice ÔÇö Chen Residence Lindfield ÔÇö fee quote
Date: 21 May 2026 3:55 PM

Amelia,

Thanks for the survey and geotech. CivilFlow can provide **concept stormwater strategy** for the Chen site:

**Scope:**
- On-site detention sizing desktop (Ku-ring-gai DCP Chapter B13)
- Downstream pipe capacity check against council mapping
- Concept OSD location options given 2.1 m fall and south boundary sewer easement
- One revision and conference with architect

**Fee:** $4,850 + GST
**Programme:** 10 business days from instruction and survey receipt

**Preliminary observation:** Rear yard low point favours underground OSD tank east of garage; overflow to street kerb may need council hydraulic approval ÔÇö we'll confirm in report.

Let me know if owners want us appointed.

Kate Morrison
Principal, CivilFlow Hydraulic Consultants

---

Date: 21 May 2026 3:55 PM

Amelia,

Thanks for the survey and geotech. CivilFlow can provide **concept stormwater strategy** for the Chen site:

**Scope:**
- On-site detention sizing desktop (Ku-ring-gai DCP Chapter B13)
- Downstream pipe capacity check against council mapping
- Concept OSD location options given 2.1 m fall and south boundary sewer easement
- One revision and conference with architect

**Fee:** $4,850 + GST
**Programme:** 10 business days from instruction and survey receipt

**Preliminary observation:** Rear yard low point favours underground OSD tank east of garage; overflow to street kerb may need council hydraulic approval ÔÇö we'll confirm in report.

Let me know if owners want us appointed.

Kate Morrison
Principal, CivilFlow Hydraulic Consultants

[{"document_id":"3ed88ec4-4511-5b81-bc19-71d1bad42da6","chunk_id":"658883ed-649b-5122-bdd8-defd5a89db47","document":"08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/08-email-sydney-water-sewer-diagram.md","page_or_section":null,"snippet":"From: Sydney Water Property Services <propertyservices@sydneywater.com.au>
To: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
Subject: Sewerage services diagram ÔÇö 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield ÔÇö Order #SW-884412
Date: 8 May 2026 2:17 PM

Dear Amelia Harrison,

Please find attached the sewerage services diagram for **Lot 14 DP 789012, 14 Wattle Grove Lindfield NSW 2070**.

**Summary from diagram SW-DIA-2070-14-088:**

- 150 mm diameter sewer main located in **Drainage Easement 2.0 m wide** along southern boundary
- Maintenance hole **MH-4471** within easement at south-west corner of lot
- Minimum clearance to structures per Sydney Water Building Over Sewer policy applies
- **Section 73 or Build Over Sewer application likely required** if proposed footings or slabs encroach within 2.0 m of sewer or over alignment

This diagram is current as at 8 May 2026. For design submissions contact Developer Services.

Regards,
Sydney Water Property Services

---

From: Amelia Harrison <amelia.harrison@harrisonclarke.com.au>
